'''ramofo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobleness|nobleness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobleness|nobleness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| ramofo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ræmefeth|ræmefeth]] || [[word:ræmefej|ræmefej]] || [[word:ræmefesh|ræmefesh]] || [[word:ræmefe|ræmefe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ramomofoth|ramomofoth]] || [[word:ramomofoj|ramomofoj]] || [[word:ramomofosh|ramomofosh]] || [[word:ramomofo|ramomofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ramofoth|ramofoth]] || [[word:ramofoj|ramofoj]] || [[word:ramofosh|ramofosh]] || [[word:ramofo|ramofo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ramoffoth|ramoffoth]] || [[word:ramoffoj|ramoffoj]] || [[word:ramoffosh|ramoffosh]] || [[word:ramoffof|ramoffof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ramofotho|ramofotho]] || [[word:ramofojo|ramofojo]] || [[word:ramofosho|ramofosho]] || [[word:ramofoko|ramofoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ramofoth|ramofoth]] || [[word:ramofoj|ramofoj]] || [[word:ramofosh|ramofosh]] || [[word:ramofo|ramofo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ramofothol|ramofothol]] || [[word:ramofojol|ramofojol]] || [[word:ramofoshol|ramofoshol]] || [[word:ramofokol|ramofokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ramofothotho|ramofothotho]] || [[word:ramofojojo|ramofojojo]] || [[word:ramofoshosho|ramofoshosho]] || [[word:ramofoko|ramofoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ramofothon|ramofothon]] || [[word:ramofojon|ramofojon]] || [[word:ramofoshon|ramofoshon]] || [[word:ramofokon|ramofokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ramofothoro|ramofothoro]] || [[word:ramofojoro|ramofojoro]] || [[word:ramofoshoro|ramofoshoro]] || [[word:ramofokoro|ramofokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
